name: /standards-remove: per G-9 chains to folder archival -- the source-folder file moves to _archived/
command:
mkdir -p tree/my && printf "source:
  id: my-source
  authoritative_publisher: M
  authoritative_url: https://my.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
" > tree/my/my-source.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id my-source --tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f tree/my/_archived/my-source.yaml ] && [ ! -f tree/my/my-source.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: my-source
  name: My
  url: https://my.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
